audit_items.proof_trace: Function only frees main struct via kfree() but never frees target->regions allocated in add_dirs. When kobject refcount drops to zero through sysfs operations, release is called directly bypassing rm_dirs cleanup.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers sysfs operations causing kobject reference drops, leading to release function calls that leak target->regions allocations, eventually exhausting kernel memory.
